Transcrição Completa: 4 QA 2

Conversa sobre Metas e Personal Endgame Template

[00:00]
"All right. So, the first question, what would you say is the right time for like when to actually achieve some of these things? So, if I if I for example want to make $10 million in cash, like, you know, if I'm just getting started or if I'm running an agency, like, how do I know when it's..."

[00:20]
"No, more than five years. I think anybody looking past a five-year horizon is is pie in the sky. I like to think in in I like to think in things of almost daily activities, right? But when you annualize something that big, you know, I mean, I I wouldn't like to see it push past five years, you know, but, you know, my gut says, you know, if you're just getting going, make it a make it a three to five year mark."

[00:50]
"Uh, what if I don't meet the expectations I've set on my personal endgame template? What do I do then?"

[00:56]
"So, this is great. Then adjust it, right? I mean, this is why I created this because a lot of people think they, you know, I want a Rolls, I want to, you know, Phantom, I want a Ghost, I want a Lambo, and I want 10 million bucks. If you really sit down, you may not want all that shit, right? You think you want it, but do you really want it? And this actually helps readjust to make your goals more realistic."

[01:23]
"I can promise you not. And listen, I want you to set as high as goals as possible, but making 3 million versus a 100 million is a lot easier. And if you can be fulfilled at that 3 million, you have a better shot of getting there than 100."

[01:38]
"So, I just recalibrate if I miss it."

[01:41]
"Yeah, you got to recalibrate it. But we're going to get into this framework. I'm going to give you the framework um the accountabilities and how you crank on this thing daily. How do you measure it? How do you optimize it? But yeah, if you miss your target, you've just got to readjust and keep going."

[01:57]
"Got it."

[01:58]
"And then last question, how how many things like should I actually have on my personal endgame template? Like I saw you had about six."

[02:05]
"Yeah, I would say no more than eight, you know, and it's okay if you just have one, you know, and again, they don't have to be monetary things, right? To me, it could be you want to learn a foreign language, you want to um run a marathon, you want 10 million bucks, you want a house in Jamaica or whatever it is."

[02:24]
"The most important piece of that is what it not just what it is. That's the visual piece of it, right? So, you have that. It's the when and why. And then I encourage everybody to take this, make it a desktop, make it a a wallpaper, put it on your phone. We should drop some examples um you know below on how they could execute this."

[02:47]
"Okay. Hey guys, thanks so much. Again, we'll have more content in here, more ideas on how to use your um personal in-game templates. I personally um post mine on my uh bathroom mirror, so every morning when I get out of the shower, I can see that."

[03:04]
"Um we'll give you some examples of of where else. We'd love to hear how you're using it. Plus, we'll give you uh the ability to uh answer some more questions and we'll get them answered for you. I'll see you in the next section."

📊 RESUMO EXECUTIVO

NÚMEROS PRINCIPAIS:

Horizonte de tempo máximo: 5 anos

Horizonte recomendado para iniciantes: 3 a 5 anos

Exemplos de metas financeiras mencionadas: $10 milhões, $3 milhões, $100 milhões

Número máximo de itens no template: 8 itens

Número mínimo aceitável: 1 item

Exemplo dado pelo instrutor: 6 itens

ESTRATÉGIAS E SISTEMAS:

Personal Endgame Template como ferramenta de planejamento

Foco em atividades diárias ao invés de apenas metas anualizadas

Recalibração constante das metas quando não atingidas

Visualização diária das metas (wallpaper, espelho do banheiro, telefone)

Framework futuro prometido sobre: accountabilities, medição diária, otimização

ESTRUTURA:

Componentes essenciais do template: O QUÊ (visual), QUANDO (prazo), POR QUÊ (motivação)

Metas podem ser monetárias ou não-monetárias (idiomas, maratona, imóveis)

Sistema de ajuste e recalibração contínua

Integração visual no cotidiano para reforço constante

DADOS FINANCEIROS:

Comparação de dificuldade: $3M é significativamente mais alcançável que $100M

Realismo financeiro priorizado sobre ambição irrealista

Exemplos de ativos de luxo: Rolls Royce Phantom, Ghost, Lamborghini

DURAÇÃO: ~3:15 minutos
FORMATO: Sessão de Q&A (Perguntas e Respostas) sobre Personal Endgame Template
